glencore-plc.summary: $1.5B coordinated US DOJ + UK SFO + Brazil CADE resolution (May 2022) for bribery of officials in 7 countries.

ericsson-lm-telephone.summary: $206.7M DOJ plea (Mar 2023) for breaching 2019 DPA on Djibouti/China/Vietnam/Indonesia/Kuwait bribery; cumulative penalties exceed $1.2B.

goldman-sachs.summary: $2.9B global resolution (Oct 2020) — including $1B subsidiary guilty plea — for the 1MDB Malaysian sovereign wealth fund bribery scheme.
